title: Map Command, Page State, Navigation Invariants, and Transactional Updates · Stakeholder Go Mission
summary: A regional parks field-guide and accessibility team. They need a keyboard-first deterministic command guide with discoverable help, bounded paginated Pokemon browsing, clear errors, stable output, and exact changed-session evidence. Planned artifact: Deliver Accessible Regional Field-Guide REPL with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defe…
objectives: Define learner, field user, decision, command sequence, accepted latency, failure consequence, and observable value before coding.
Represent command name, purpose, usage, aliases, and handler in an injected registry with deterministic help order.
Keep prompts, progress, errors, and results understandable without color, animation, pointer input, or fragile terminal width.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Pokedex product engineering and Go Commit to the mission model · Project Pokedex Go User Decision
steps.instruction:
project case — A project Go team handles case 5645 during a disconnected community-lab recovery drill. Build deterministic Go evidence to commit only admitted page transitions while preserving cursor state on failure; no user-visible meaning may rely on color or cursor motion; then change one toolchain, target, artifact, migration, rollback, or restore condition and reconcile the release. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original fixtures only. Real PokéAPI traffic, DNS, sockets, TLS, host files, terminals, signals, race and leak claims, load, cross-platform packaging, accessibility review, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Pokedex product engineering and Go Commit to the mission model · Project Pokedex Go User Decision.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Pokedex Go Map Transition Tests structural check is only one gate. transactional Pokemon page navigator must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.
